underlying_goal: Validate a Remote Agent Dispatch System across implementation phases and rebuild danxbot-gpt-manager using the danxbot-flytebot framework
friction_detail: Claude repeatedly hardcoded repo-specific values into framework code despite user corrections, and Docker Compose config issues remained unresolved by session end.
brief_summary: User wanted to validate a dispatch system and rebuild danxbot-gpt-manager using an existing framework; testing passed but live E2E failed due to infra, and the framework rebuild hit repeated friction around config separation and Docker issues.
